member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken
member.summary: Represents an OAuth access token with expiration details.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Represents an OAuth access token with expiration details.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken.IsExpired
member.summary: Check if token has expired.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken.IsExpiringSoon
member.summary: Check if token is expiring soon (within 5 minutes).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState
member.summary: Represents the authentication state of an account (AU-05).

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState.Authenticated
member.summary: Account has valid tokens; syncs can proceed.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState.AuthRequired
member.summary: Token refresh failed; user must re-authenticate via browser.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AuthStateService
member.summary: Observable auth state service (AU-05). Publishes account auth state transitions for UI subscribers.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ConsentStore
member.summary: In-memory consent store for tokens (AU-02, AU-03). Desktop app will override with database-backed implementation.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService
member.summary: Publishes auth state transitions for UI subscribers (AU-05). Observables fire from background threads; subscribers must use ObserveOn(RxApp.MainThreadScheduler).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService.AccountAuthStateChanged
member.summary: Observable fired whenever an account's auth state changes (e.g. token refresh fails). Fires from the token-refresh background thread; subscribers must marshal to UI thread.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService.PublishAuthStateChange(System.Guid,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState)
member.summary: Publish an auth state transition.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IConsentStore
member.summary: Records and retrieves per-account consent decisions for insecure token fallback storage (AU-02, AU-03, NF-06).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IConsentStore.GetConsentDecisionAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if user has already made a consent decision for this account.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IConsentStore.SetConsentDecisionAsync(System.Guid,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Record user's consent decision (allow or deny insecure fallback token storage).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient
member.summary: Abstraction over MSAL (Microsoft Authentication Library) for OAuth flows (AU-01). All implementations must use ConfigureAwait(false) on all await calls.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient.AcquireTokenInteractiveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquire an access token via the system browser interactive flow (AU-01). Scopes requested: Files.ReadWrite, offline_access. Must not be called on the Avalonia UI thread — dispatch via Task.Run.
member.returns: Access token and refresh token (if offline_access granted).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient.AcquireTokenSilentAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempt silent token refresh using cached tokens (AU-04). Never throws on failure — returns with failure instead.
member.returns: Success if refresh succeeded; Failure if user auth required or network error.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager
member.summary: Manages OAuth token lifecycle: acquisition, refresh, persistence, and failure handling (AU-02, AU-04, AU-05, NF-06). Scoped per account — each account has its own token state machine. All methods return Result<T, string> or Option<T> (NF-16).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.AccountId
member.summary: Account ID this token manager is bound to.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.GetTokenSilentlyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a valid access token, attempting silent refresh if needed (AU-04). Returns Failure if refresh fails or user must re-authenticate.
member.remarks: On failure, the auth state transitions to AuthRequired and is published.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.PersistTokenAsync(AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persist a newly-acquired access token (e.g. after interactive auth flow).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.ClearTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clear all stored tokens for this account (e.g. on logout).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.MsalClient
member.summary: MSAL client implementation (AU-01). Handles system browser OAuth flow for consumers tenant only.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.MsalClient.#ctor(Microsoft.Identity.Client.IPublicClientApplication)
member.summary: MSAL client implementation (AU-01). Handles system browser OAuth flow for consumers tenant only.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.TokenManager
member.summary: Token manager implementation (AU-02, AU-04, AU-05). Scoped per account. Handles silent refresh and token persistence.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.TokenManager.#ctor(System.Guid,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService)
member.summary: Token manager implementation (AU-02, AU-04, AU-05). Scoped per account. Handles silent refresh and token persistence.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItem
member.summary: Represents a single item returned by a Graph delta query.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItem.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Represents a single item returned by a Graph delta query.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemFactory.Create(System.String,System.String,System.String,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Creates a file or folder delta item.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemFactory.CreateDeleted(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a deleted delta item (Graph delta returns only the id for deleted items).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType
member.summary: Classifies a single item returned by a Graph delta query.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType.File
member.summary: A regular file that was added or modified.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType.Folder
member.summary: A folder that was added or modified.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType.Deleted
member.summary: An item that was deleted on the remote.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItemType.FolderRenamed
member.summary: A folder that was renamed or moved, detected via the Graph @microsoft.graph.moveOrRenamed annotation (SE-12).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryError
member.summary: Base discriminated union for delta query failures.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base discriminated union for delta query failures.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaTokenExpiredError
member.summary: Returned when the stored delta token has expired (HTTP 410 Gone — SE-10).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaTokenExpiredError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned when the stored delta token has expired (HTTP 410 Gone — SE-10).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryThrottledError
member.summary: Returned when Graph API throttles after exhausting retries (HTTP 429 — EH-02).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryThrottledError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned when Graph API throttles after exhausting retries (HTTP 429 — EH-02).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryFailedError
member.summary: Returned for any other Graph API failure.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryFailedError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned for any other Graph API failure.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryErrorFactory
member.summary: Factory for subtypes.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryErrorFactory.TokenExpired
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryErrorFactory.Throttled(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryErrorFactory.Failed(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryResult
member.summary: The result of a successful delta query page iteration. is the full @odata.deltaLink URL for the next incremental call.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItem},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: The result of a successful delta query page iteration. is the full @odata.deltaLink URL for the next incremental call.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryResultFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaQueryResultFactory.Create(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaItem},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaToken
member.summary: Stores the @odata.deltaLink URL returned by Graph after a completed delta sync. Persisted per account/folder in SQLite. A token older than 30 days is considered expired (SE-10).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaToken.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Stores the @odata.deltaLink URL returned by Graph after a completed delta sync. Persisted per account/folder in SQLite. A token older than 30 days is considered expired (SE-10).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaToken.IsExpired
member.summary: Returns when the token is more than 30 days old (SE-10).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaTokenFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.DeltaTokenFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a with the current UTC time as the acquisition time.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.IDeltaQueryService
member.summary: Executes Graph delta queries for incremental OneDrive sync (SE-09, SE-10, SE-12). All methods return — callers never see Graph exceptions.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.DeltaQueries.IDeltaQueryService.GetDeltaAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches all changed items for since the last sync. Pass for to perform a full (initial) sync. The returned must be persisted for the next call.
member.returns: when the token has expired (HTTP 410). when Graph API throttles after exhausting retries (HTTP 429). for any other Graph failure.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileDownloadResult
member.summary: Represents the outcome of a successful file download.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileDownloadResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Represents the outcome of a successful file download.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileDownloadResultFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileDownloadResultFactory.Create(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileUploadResult
member.summary: Represents the outcome of a successful file upload.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileUploadResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Represents the outcome of a successful file upload.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileUploadResultFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.FileUploadResultFactory.Create(System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.IFileDownloader
member.summary: Downloads files from OneDrive to the local file system (SE-02). Respects and cleans up partial files on cancellation. All methods return — callers never see Graph exceptions.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.IFileDownloader.DownloadAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the remote file identified by to . Progress is reported in total bytes written via . Any partial file is deleted if the operation is cancelled or fails.
member.remarks: SE-16 (resumable downloads via byte-range) is Post-MVP. The interface is designed to accommodate a byteOffset parameter in a future overload without breaking this signature.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.IFileUploader
member.summary: Uploads local files to OneDrive via the Graph API. Uses direct PUT for files ≤ 4 MB; chunked upload sessions for larger files. All methods return — callers never see Graph exceptions.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FileOperations.IFileUploader.UploadAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads the file at into the remote folder . Progress is reported in total bytes uploaded via .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.IOneDriveFolderService
member.summary: Fetches OneDrive folder metadata from the Graph API (AM-03, AM-04). All methods return — callers never see Graph exceptions.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.IOneDriveFolderService.GetRootFoldersAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the root-level folders for the authenticated user's OneDrive. Call with the access token acquired by IMsalClient.AcquireTokenInteractiveAsync.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.IOneDriveFolderService.GetChildFoldersAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the direct child folders of the specified . Used for lazy tree expansion (AM-03).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.OneDriveFolder
member.summary: Represents a folder in OneDrive returned from the Graph API (AM-03).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.OneDriveFolder.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents a folder in OneDrive returned from the Graph API (AM-03).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.OneDriveFolderFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.OneDriveFolderFactory.Create(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.FolderBrowsing.OneDriveFolderService
member.summary: Graph API implementation of (AM-03, AM-04).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Infrastructure.IGraphClientFactory
member.summary: Creates authenticated instances from an access token. Abstracts client construction so callers can be tested without real Graph calls.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Infrastructure.IGraphClientFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a configured with the supplied bearer token.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.IOneDriveClientOptions.AzureClientId
member.summary: The Azure App Registration client ID for the consumers tenant.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.IOneDriveClientOptions.RedirectUri
member.summary: Redirect URI registered in the Azure portal (local loopback or urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.OneDriveClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the OneDrive Client package.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.OneDriveClientOptionsFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.OneDriveClientOptionsFactory.Create(System.String,System.Uri)
member.summary: Creates a new instance.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.OneDriveClientServiceExtensions
member.summary: Registers AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client services with the DI container.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.OneDriveClientServiceExtensions.AddOneDriveClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.OneDriveClientOptions)
member.summary: Adds MSAL authentication, token management, consent storage, auth state notifications, OneDrive folder browsing, delta queries, and file operations to .
